{{Quote|A litigation droid may be your best defense!|C4LR litigation droid ad campaign|<ref name="CFT-D" />}}
The '''C4LR litigation droid''' was a model of [[Droid/Legends|droid]] manufactured by [[Caldrahlsen Mechanicals]].<ref name="GFT" /> The model was an excellent [[Lawyer/Legends|litigator]] and one of the few types of droids that were accredited to work within the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] legal system.<ref name="CFT-D" /> C4LRs were used by [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|COMPNOR's]] [[Coalition for Progress/Legends|Coalition for Progress]], specifically within the [[Justice (department)/Legends|Justice]] branch to reinforce the policy of Imperial legal infallibility.<ref name="FOP">''[[The Far Orbit Project]]''</ref> The Imperial [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisition]] also adopted the C4LR into its service due to its reliability.<ref name="CFT-D" />

Hardwired to prevent lying, misrepresentation and exaggeration, one could always trust a C4LR to be completely reliable. The droid was programmed with a perfect memory, and was able to record and store all information from a court proceeding, including evidence and testimonies.<ref name="GFT" />

The C4LR's [[litigation module]] came preloaded with only one law specialty installed. For 2,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] each, up to four more modules could be installed. These modules included such specialties as Imperial law, taxation law and military jurisprudence.<ref name="GFT" />

Due to the processing capabilities of the [[AX-02 Verbobrain]], many [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] and [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Captain/Legends|captains]] jury-rigged the droid's brain into their ship's [[Navigation computer/Legends|navigation computers]]. [[KesselRunner]], a commentator on''[[Cynabar's Droid Datalog]]'' wondered if the brain could also act as a massive navigation data reservoir. Another commentator, [[Siri]], liked the idea but was of the opinion that the droid would refuse to assist in fleeing from Imperial forces if the smuggler was breaking the law.<ref name="CFT-D" />
